'''Warl Thimbus''' was a quixotic [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] serving with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed at the [[Rebel outpost (Taul)|Rebel outpost]] on [[Taul/Legends|Taul]], Thimbus led [[Parody squad]] when the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Dominator (Victory-class)|''Dominator'']] [[Battle of Taul|assaulted]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] and a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], Thimbus was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] but displayed no [[The Force/Legends|Force powers]].<ref name="UG" />
